title: Chapter 208
content:
Chapter 208: Chapter 208: When the Quest Serves Itself on a Silver Platter [2]

Queen Tia.

Because she looked ethereal.

She wore a black gown that contrasted beautifully against her pale skin. Low heels. Stockings that enhanced every curve of her legs.

And her gorgeous elven face looked as if her soul had departed her body.

’The elven king made this masterpiece his wife?’

"What is happening here?"

Her voice was steady despite the chaos before her eyes. She started scanning the room. The smell of sex hung thick in the air, impossible to ignore. Then she felt something wet beneath her heel.

She looked down.

The soaked panty ball Jax had thrown earlier. She had stepped directly on it.

Ilythra answered without a shred of shame.

"Can’t you see? I’m entertaining myself. The party was boring."

While carrying Ilythra toward the bed, Jax finally noticed her standing there.

’Shit. I completely forgot about her.’

Seeing both Jax and Ilythra’s gazes land on her, Tia panicked.

She quickly closed the door. At least no one else would witness this madness.

"Mother, this is completely..."

She paused. Realization struck.

"So you planned this from the start. I knew you were plotting something. You never attend trivial matters, yet you insisted on coming to this stupid ball."

Her voice rose with accusation.

"This is madness! Mother, he’s..."

She pressed a hand to her chest.

"I should go. Pretend I saw nothing. This is indecent!"

Ilythra’s response came lazy and dismissive.

"Indecent? Oh, sweet Tia. You still don’t understand, do you?"

She waved her hand carelessly.

"Well, forget what I said. Go on. Leave."

Tia clutched her chest tighter. Her feet started moving toward the door. Each step felt heavier than the last.

At that moment, Jax checked the quest timer.

{Ten minutes remaining}

’Fuck. I’m running out of time. I need her to complete the quest.’

He needed to step up. Manipulate her somehow. But before he could say a single word, Ilythra pulled him by his tie.

Her lips crashed against his in a deep kiss.

Then she lowered the straps of her dress and guided his hands to her bare shoulders. The signal was clear. Pull from below. Remove everything.

She laid back on the bed, dress pooling around her waist. Her eyes found Tia, whose feet had stopped moving entirely.

"Indecent, you said?"

Her smile turned knowing.

"Dear, look at the mirror to your right. Tell me what you see."

Tia’s gaze shifted to the mirror reluctantly.

"Disgust," she answered coldly.

"Disgust?" Ilythra laughed softly. "Or envy? Look again, Tia. See yourself. Not this prim wife. But the woman starving for more."

Her voice sharpened.

"And if you still don’t understand, I’ll say it again. Get out of here. I don’t want to see a helpless daughter hiding her urges. Hiding her desire to want this too."

A pause.

"Masturbating while hiding."

The realization hit her like lightning. Her mother knew. She knew what Tia had done while watching earlier.

No more words came. She had accepted defeat. Her denial crumbled into nothing.

"See, Tia? Even now you want it."

Then Ilythra turned to Jax. One hand pulled his tie. The other grabbed his cock directly.

"You still have two options."

"Ignore this and regret it for the rest of your life. Or cherish this moment. Do whatever you want. Fuck the world off and see what new possibilities exist."

Her voice softened with something almost like pain.

"Don’t make my mistake. I wasted my entire life in stupid politics. Your father-in-law and I never shared a single romantic feeling. It was all political bonds. The chains every noble must wear."

"But when I got my hands on this, I saw a different world. A perspective I was deprived of for centuries."

Her eyes met Tia’s directly.

"So don’t let your mind defeat your heart. Follow whatever it tells you. Before your body gives up. Before you lose the glow of your prime."

Tia pressed her chest harder.

’It’s not like I’m leaving my husband. Not like I’m truly betraying him. I just need my own enjoyment too.’

Her mind replayed the scene from earlier and back in Elf Kingdom. Watching Jax pound her mother relentlessly. The brutal pace. The pleasure written across Ilythra’s face.

Her husband could never deliver that. He never had. Maybe that’s why she wanted it so desperately.

Was it urge? Or jealousy? She wanted to feel what her mother felt.

Hard.

"Mother."

Her voice came out steady now.

"I’ve made up my mind. I will do whatever I want."

Ilythra’s smile widened with genuine delight.

"And what is it you want?"

Tia’s finger rose slowly.

Pointing directly at Jax’s cock.

Shame colored her cheeks crimson, but she didn’t withdraw.

Ilythra patted the bed beside her.

"Then come here. Mommy will give both her children a proper lesson."

Meanwhile, Jax was floating on clouds.

This quest was going perfectly. He hadn’t lifted a single finger to manipulate anyone. Task two was literally walking toward him on her own. Eyes locked onto his throbbing cock.

And making everything sweeter, Jax spotted something above the bed.

A runic stone sat on the overhead rack. Strange markings covered its surface.

Waiting to be patted three times.
